examples: Maria finished school, and then became the librarian of the Nantucket athenaeum .
The building was given the American Architecture Award 2009, by the Chicago Athenaeum.
The vertical garden at the Athenaeum, which is eight stories tall, has 260 plant species and more than 12,000 plants.
In 1906, the world's first feature film, "The Story of the Kelly Gang, " was premiered at the Athenaeum Hall, Melbourne, Australia.
The Grade 2 listed Athenaeum was built in the 1850s with public subscriptions on the site of a former mansion where Llanelli Reading Society had been holding meetings for more than half a century.
